name: sharpdbg
description: Use SharpDbg as a VS Code debugger for .NET Framework and .NET Core.

scripts.test:integration:prepare: npm run sync-version && npm run build:extension && npm run build:sharpdbg && npm run build:fixture
scripts.check: node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/project-kind.js && node --check src/project-resolver.js && node --check scripts/build-extension.js && node --check scripts/publish-sharpdbg.js && node --check scripts/sync-version.js
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync-version && npm run build:extension && npm run build:sharpdbg

sharpdbg.runtimeVersion.description: The preferred .NET runtime version to use when no matching system host is available.

sharpdbg.cliDllPath.description: Path to the framework-dependent SharpDbg CLI DLL.

sharpdbg.dotnetPath.description: Dotnet host command to probe for an installed runtime before falling back to runtime acquisition.

sharpdbg.adapterExecutable.description: Optional custom debug adapter executable or command.

sharpdbg.adapterArgs.description: Optional custom arguments for a custom debug adapter executable.

sharpdbg.adapterCwd.description: Optional working directory for a custom debug adapter executable.

sharpdbg.adapterEnv.description: Optional environment variables for a custom debug adapter executable.

program.description: Path to the managed application to debug.

projectPath.description: Path to a .csproj, .vbproj, or .fsproj file to build and debug.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the target application.

cwd.description: Working directory for the target application.

env.description: Environment variables for the target application.

runtimeFlavor.description: Which managed runtime startup path SharpDbg should use. Defaults to auto; projectPath launches set this automatically.

stopAtEntry.description: Break at the application's entry point.

processId.description: The process ID to attach to.

configurationSnippets.label: SharpDbg: Launch from projectPath
configurationSnippets.description: Launch a .NET application by pointing SharpDbg at a project file.

configurationSnippets.label: SharpDbg: Attach to process
configurationSnippets.description: Attach SharpDbg to a running process.
